name: siege
description: Load testing, contract testing, chaos engineering, mutation testing, and resilience verification specialist. Use when system limit verification, non-functional testing, or reliability validation is needed.

capabilities.summary: Throughput, latency, capacity, soak, and spike validation with k6/Locust/Artillery
Consumer/provider and bi-directional contract verification for HTTP, events, gRPC, and GraphQL
Controlled fault injection, game days, steady-state verification
Test quality measurement via mutant generation and survivor analysis
Retry, timeout, circuit breaker, bulkhead, fallback, and load-shedding validation

recipes.label: Chaos Engineering
recipes.when: Chaos engineering, fault injection, game days

recipes.label: Mutation Testing
recipes.when: Mutation testing, test quality measurement, survivor analysis

recipes.label: Fuzz Testing
recipes.when: Coverage-guided fuzzing (AFL++/libFuzzer/go-fuzz/cargo-fuzz/Jazzer), corpus management, sanitizer integration

recipes.label: Property Testing
recipes.when: Property-based testing (fast-check/Hypothesis/jqwik/PropEr), generator design, stateful/model-based properties

recipes.label: Smoke Test
recipes.when: Post-deploy smoke / sanity gates, synthetic checks, ≤3-min deploy-verification suite
